markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss GrowthX's content strategy proposal and approach for Superhuman](https://fathom.video/share/LTFMC6oVFQ9nBnLZbsvMd5N4EZ4dYBNx?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX identified 28,000 potential keywords Superhuman doesn't rank for, representing a 10x traffic opportunity](https://fathom.video/share/LTFMC6oVFQ9nBnLZbsvMd5N4EZ4dYBNx?tab=summary&timestamp=14.0)
  - [Proposed approach combines programmatic content creation with editorial oversight to ensure quality and brand voice](https://fathom.video/share/LTFMC6oVFQ9nBnLZbsvMd5N4EZ4dYBNx?tab=summary&timestamp=682.0)
  - [Superhuman team's main concerns are maintaining quality/voice and aligning with overall web strategy](https://fathom.video/share/LTFMC6oVFQ9nBnLZbsvMd5N4EZ4dYBNx?tab=summary&timestamp=1686.0)
  - [Next steps: GrowthX to send proposal, Superhuman to share writing examples for voice calibration](https://fathom.video/share/LTFMC6oVFQ9nBnLZbsvMd5N4EZ4dYBNx?tab=summary&timestamp=1917.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Research and Content Opportunity Analysis

  - [Conducted extensive research on Superhuman's market, competitors, and content gaps](https://fathom.video/share/LTFMC6oVFQ9nBnLZbsvMd5N4EZ4dYBNx?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)
  - [Identified 28,000 keywords Superhuman doesn't rank for, clustered into 2,800 potential content pages](https://fathom.video/share/LTFMC6oVFQ9nBnLZbsvMd5N4EZ4dYBNx?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)
  - [Opportunity breakdown:](https://fathom.video/share/LTFMC6oVFQ9nBnLZbsvMd5N4EZ4dYBNx?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
      - [126 "very easy" topics = \~100,000 monthly searches](https://fathom.video/share/LTFMC6oVFQ9nBnLZbsvMd5N4EZ4dYBNx?tab=summary&timestamp=491.0)
      - [700 "easy" topics = \~1.2 million monthly searches](https://fathom.video/share/LTFMC6oVFQ9nBnLZbsvMd5N4EZ4dYBNx?tab=summary&timestamp=527.0)
      - [Total opportunity of \~28 million monthly searches (realistically targeting 20% of that)](https://fathom.video/share/LTFMC6oVFQ9nBnLZbsvMd5N4EZ4dYBNx?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

### Content Creation Process and Quality Assurance

  - [Two-week calibration period to align on voice, tone, and quality expectations](https://fathom.video/share/LTFMC6oVFQ9nBnLZbsvMd5N4EZ4dYBNx?tab=summary&timestamp=689.0)
  - [Combination of programmatic content creation and human editing/oversight](https://fathom.video/share/LTFMC6oVFQ9nBnLZbsvMd5N4EZ4dYBNx?tab=summary&timestamp=682.0)
  - [Managing editor assigned to Superhuman's account, overseeing team of writers, editors, and SEO specialists](https://fathom.video/share/LTFMC6oVFQ9nBnLZbsvMd5N4EZ4dYBNx?tab=summary&timestamp=739.0)
  - [Ability to incorporate Superhuman's custom knowledge bases, quotes, or other assets into content](https://fathom.video/share/LTFMC6oVFQ9nBnLZbsvMd5N4EZ4dYBNx?tab=summary&timestamp=1051.0)

### Pricing and Deliverables

  - [Editorial work stream: 50,000-100,000 words/month at \~$0.10-0.15/word](https://fathom.video/share/LTFMC6oVFQ9nBnLZbsvMd5N4EZ4dYBNx?tab=summary&timestamp=1579.0)
  - [Includes strategy, content creation, SEO auditing, and access to GrowthX's platform](https://fathom.video/share/LTFMC6oVFQ9nBnLZbsvMd5N4EZ4dYBNx?tab=summary&timestamp=1608.0)
  - [Programmatic work stream priced separately based on volume (e.g., 1,200 pages to start)](https://fathom.video/share/LTFMC6oVFQ9nBnLZbsvMd5N4EZ4dYBNx?tab=summary&timestamp=1617.0)

### Superhuman's Content Strategy Considerations

  - [Current lack of comprehensive web strategy for content organization and user journeys](https://fathom.video/share/LTFMC6oVFQ9nBnLZbsvMd5N4EZ4dYBNx?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [Need to balance immediate content creation with long-term site structure planning](https://fathom.video/share/LTFMC6oVFQ9nBnLZbsvMd5N4EZ4dYBNx?tab=summary&timestamp=1686.0)
  - [Potential to start with targeted sections (e.g., email template library) and expand strategically](https://fathom.video/share/LTFMC6oVFQ9nBnLZbsvMd5N4EZ4dYBNx?tab=summary&timestamp=1512.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to send formal proposal by end of day](https://fathom.video/share/LTFMC6oVFQ9nBnLZbsvMd5N4EZ4dYBNx?tab=summary&timestamp=1920.0)
  - [Superhuman to share writing examples for voice/tone calibration](https://fathom.video/share/LTFMC6oVFQ9nBnLZbsvMd5N4EZ4dYBNx?tab=summary&timestamp=1865.0)
  - [Superhuman team to discuss internally and align on strategy](https://fathom.video/share/LTFMC6oVFQ9nBnLZbsvMd5N4EZ4dYBNx?tab=summary&timestamp=1686.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up meeting in the next few days to finalize details](https://fathom.video/share/LTFMC6oVFQ9nBnLZbsvMd5N4EZ4dYBNx?tab=summary&timestamp=2010.0)
  - [Target potential February 10th kickoff if moving forward](https://fathom.video/share/LTFMC6oVFQ9nBnLZbsvMd5N4EZ4dYBNx?tab=summary&timestamp=1948.0)
